generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance AirCo2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO2 sensor (e.g., MH‑Z19) mounted on a Raspberry Pi 4B, samples at 1 Hz, transmits data via MQTT to Azure IoT Hub"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirCo2DataTransmitted
]

instance AirTempHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature and humidity sensor (e.g., DHT22) on Raspberry Pi 4B, samples at 1 Hz, transmits data via MQTT to Azure IoT Hub"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirTempHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance AirPMSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Particulate‑matter sensor (e.g., SPS30) on Raspberry Pi 4B, samples at 1 Hz, transmits data via MQTT to Azure IoT Hub"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AirPMDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor attached to the physical greenhouse, samples continuously, data persisted in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor on the greenhouse, samples continuously, data persisted in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseCo2Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "CO₂ sensor on the greenhouse, samples continuously, data persisted in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseCo2DataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseSoilMoistureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Soil‑moisture sensor on the greenhouse, samples continuously, data persisted in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseSoilMoistureDataTransmitted
]

instance GreenhouseLightIntensitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light‑intensity sensor on the greenhouse, samples continuously, data persisted in InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GreenhouseLightIntensityDataTransmitted
]

instance CranePositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position and kinematic data sensor on the lab‑scale gantry crane, samples continuously, data written via Python app to TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CranePositionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance AirCo2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirCo2Sensor
]

instance AirTempHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirTempHumiditySensor
]

instance AirPMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AirPMSensor
]

instance GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseTemperatureSensor
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseHumiditySensor
]

instance GreenhouseCo2DataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseCo2Sensor
]

instance GreenhouseSoilMoistureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseSoilMoistureSensor
]

instance GreenhouseLightIntensityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GreenhouseLightIntensitySensor
]

instance CranePositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CranePositionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance AirCo2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air‑quality CO₂ concentration received from AirCo2Sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirCo2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubAdapter, InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance AirTempHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Air‑quality temperature and humidity received from AirTempHumiditySensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirTempHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubAdapter, InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance AirPMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Particulate‑matter measurements received from AirPMSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AirPMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AzureIoTHubAdapter, InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance GreenhouseTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Greenhouse temperature recorded by GreenhouseTemperatureSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance GreenhouseHumidityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Greenhouse humidity recorded by GreenhouseHumiditySensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseHumidityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance GreenhouseCo2Data : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Greenhouse CO₂ concentration recorded by GreenhouseCo2Sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseCo2DataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance GreenhouseSoilMoistureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Greenhouse soil‑moisture level recorded by GreenhouseSoilMoistureSensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseSoilMoistureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance GreenhouseLightIntensityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Greenhouse light intensity recorded by GreenhouseLightIntensitySensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GreenhouseLightIntensityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBIngestor
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real‑time position and kinematic state of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CranePositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBIngestor
]

// C11: Enablers
instance AzureIoTHubAdapter : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Azure IoT Hub adapter that forwards MQTT observations to Azure services and InfluxDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance InfluxDBIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB instance used by the GreenhouseDT twin to persist time‑series sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBIngestor : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB integration point for logging application to persist crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance ActiveMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker propagating events between greenhouse control layers and twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService, OptimalControlService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous real‑time logging of actuator positions, velocities, and payload states"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Graphical representation of the crane kinematic model tied to CAD geometry, enabling orbit, slice, and annotation actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Algorithmic optimisation routine generating motion sequences to reach target positions while minimising energy or time"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction, OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Persistent storage of logged metrics for later replay and audit"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataReplayAction, HistoricalDataLoggingInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated comparison engine that sockets real‑time measurements to the simulation model and flags deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationInsight, DeviationAlertAction
]

instance FaultDetectionSupportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Research testbed for methods that identify anomalies in sensor streams"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, AnomalyDetectionAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into real‑time actuator performance and system health based on logged data"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the kinematic configuration of the crane derived from CAD visualisation"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automation routine generating motion sequences that satisfy target positions with minimal energy or travel time"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the efficiency of motion plans produced by the optimal control algorithm"
]

instance HistoricalDataReplayAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that replays historic logged metrics for audit or offline simulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the completeness and integrity of long‑term logged data"
]

instance ValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into the match between real‑time sensor measurements and simulation predictions"
]

instance DeviationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic alerting action triggered when measurement deviations exceed predefined thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into potential fault conditions detected by anomaly detection methods"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action that flags anomalous sensor streams for operator review"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Control Application, implemented in Python, uses the Physical Crane Interface to send control commands to the crane's controllers. Commands are issued by the operator through the Human Machine Interface and then propagated via the Control Application to the interface, which translates them into the appropriate control signals for the physical hardware. No specific message format, authentication, or feedback mechanism is detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "GreenhouseDT is orchestrated around a containerized deployment stack comprising an InfluxDB time‑series database for storing sensor telemetry, an ActiveMQ message broker that facilitates asynchronous event‑driven communication between the greenhouse Raspberry‑Pi sensors and the digital twin services, and modular virtual machine images that bundle the software components for rapid provisioning and scaling. The Air Quality Management exemplar adopts a cloud‑centric architecture in which the Raspberry‑Pi sensor suite publishes measurements that are processed through a pipeline of Microsoft Azure tools, with an AutomationML‑based digital twin representing the indoor environment and supporting runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction tasks."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Services within the digital twin communicate via an MQTT broker. MQTT is used as the messaging protocol for signaling among services such as the Trajectory Generator Service, Simulation Service, and Continuous Validation Service. The broker acts as a publish/subscribe message router; no further details on network topology, bandwidth, or security measures are given."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The systems integrate internally via ActiveMQ for publish/subscribe messaging and externally through InfluxDB for time‑series storage. In the Air Quality Management case, Microsoft Azure tools act as the integration layer, providing cloud‑based ingestion, analytics, and visualization services that consolidate telemetry from the physical sensors and the digital twin model, thereby enabling interoperability with enterprise cloud platforms."
]
